description: Cash-Track platform overview — service health, HTTP traffic, latency, container resources, MySQL, and error logs

panels.description: Prometheus scrape health of node-exporter (host-level metric, not a container).
panels.title: Host (Node) Status

panels.description: Available bytes on /dev/sda (/mnt/data) — green >10 GB, yellow >5 GB, red <5 GB
panels.title: Free Space /mnt/data (sda)

panels.description: Available bytes on /dev/vda1 (/) — green >10 GB, yellow >5 GB, red <5 GB
panels.title: Free Space / (vda1)

panels.description: HTTP request rate per service through Traefik
panels.title: Requests per Second (by service)
Requests per Second (by service + status code)
Request Latency P50 / P95 / P99 (by service)

panels.description: CPU % per container relative to one full core. Powered by cAdvisor.
panels.title: CPU Usage % per Container

panels.description: Active (non-reclaimable) memory per container — the value used by the OOM killer. Powered by cAdvisor.
panels.title: Memory Working Set per Container

panels.description: Seconds since last successful MySQL backup. 'Never run' = backup job has not completed yet.
panels.title: Last DB Backup

panels.description: Error-level log rate per service. Uses the `level` label extracted from JSON logs by Promtail.
panels.title: Error Log Rate (by service)

panels.description: Latest error-level log lines across all application services
panels.title: Recent Error Logs

title: Cash-Track Overview
